subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask assigned to mid tier because multi-party contract extraction requires handling multiple entity instances (party name, role, address triplets) with potential schema variation across parties and may need inference to correctly associate addresses with roles across a complex document structure. Small tier is insufficient for multi-instance structured field extraction from legal documents; frontier is unnecessary as no cross-document inference or upstream uncertainty compensation is needed."
